name: Spirit Of The Masai Mara - Fact Sheet

origin.filename: Spirit Of The Masai Mara - Fact Sheet.pdf

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1.Experiences - Adventure & Exploration  ️ 🌄
texts.text: 1.Experiences - Adventure & Exploration  ️ 🌄

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Game Drives: Explore the vast Maasai Mara with expert local guides in open-air safari vehicles, maximizing visibility and comfort. These drives often bring encounters with Africa's Big Five and the Great Migration, providing unforgettable moments .
texts.text: Game Drives: Explore the vast Maasai Mara with expert local guides in open-air safari vehicles, maximizing visibility and comfort. These drives often bring encounters with Africa's Big Five and the Great Migration, providing unforgettable moments .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Behind the Wheel Experience: A unique, thrilling option where guests take control of a safari vehicle, accompanied by an experienced guide. This hands-on experience is ideal for safari enthusiasts. Price: $725 for a half day
texts.text: Behind the Wheel Experience: A unique, thrilling option where guests take control of a safari vehicle, accompanied by an experienced guide. This hands-on experience is ideal for safari enthusiasts. Price: $725 for a half day

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Golf in the Wild: A one-of-a-kind golfing experience where guests can aim to hit biodegradable golf balls 400 feet into the wild on a map of Africa. Price:* $64 for three shots; $179 for the full golf experience .
texts.text: Golf in the Wild: A one-of-a-kind golfing experience where guests can aim to hit biodegradable golf balls 400 feet into the wild on a map of Africa. Price:* $64 for three shots; $179 for the full golf experience .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kids' Activities: Ziplining, Masai warrior training, and indoor camping make this lodge perfect for families. Babysitting services are available for parents.
texts.text: Kids' Activities: Ziplining, Masai warrior training, and indoor camping make this lodge perfect for families. Babysitting services are available for parents.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sundowners & Marshmallows: Guests can enjoy a beautiful sunset while roasting marshmallows around a campfire.
texts.text: Sundowners & Marshmallows: Guests can enjoy a beautiful sunset while roasting marshmallows around a campfire.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Helicopter Excursions & Orphanage Visits: Experience aerial views of the Mara or visit the Olmalaika Orphanage to give back to the local community.
texts.text: Helicopter Excursions & Orphanage Visits: Experience aerial views of the Mara or visit the Olmalaika Orphanage to give back to the local community.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. Wildlife - Safari at its Best: The Heart of Masai Mara
texts.text: 2. Wildlife - Safari at its Best: The Heart of Masai Mara

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 🐾 Highest Concentration of Wildlife:
texts.text: 🐾 Highest Concentration of Wildlife:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located in the Maasai Mara National Reserve, Spirit of the Masai Mara offers encounters with the Big Five and, during certain seasons, the great Migration.
texts.text: Located in the Maasai Mara National Reserve, Spirit of the Masai Mara offers encounters with the Big Five and, during certain seasons, the great Migration.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: No Fences - Open Migration Area:
texts.text: No Fences - Open Migration Area:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The lodge sits in a private conservancy forming part of an open wildlife corridor connecting the Maasai Mara and Serengeti.
texts.text: The lodge sits in a private conservancy forming part of an open wildlife corridor connecting the Maasai Mara and Serengeti.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 💧 Private Waterhole Outside the Villas:
texts.text: 💧 Private Waterhole Outside the Villas:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each villa has views of a private waterhole where guests can observe wildlife from the comfort of their rooms.
texts.text: Each villa has views of a private waterhole where guests can observe wildlife from the comfort of their rooms.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3) Accommodation - Luxury in the Wild 🏡✨
texts.text: 3) Accommodation - Luxury in the Wild 🏡✨

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 🏡 Safety and Luxury Combined:
texts.text: 🏡 Safety and Luxury Combined:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each villa offers modern luxury with 24-hour hot water, spacious bathtubs, and glass-fronted windows, providing stunning views of the waterhole. Villas are ideal for families, accommodating two adults and three children. 🌅 Glass-Fronted Villas - Stunning Views:
texts.text: Each villa offers modern luxury with 24-hour hot water, spacious bathtubs, and glass-fronted windows, providing stunning views of the waterhole. Villas are ideal for families, accommodating two adults and three children. 🌅 Glass-Fronted Villas - Stunning Views:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Uninterrupted views of wildlife at the waterhole from your villa.
texts.text: Uninterrupted views of wildlife at the waterhole from your villa.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4) Family-Owned, Family-Run - Authentic Local Experience 👨👩👧👦
texts.text: 4) Family-Owned, Family-Run - Authentic Local Experience 👨👩👧👦

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 👑 Owned by the Local Masai Family:
texts.text: 👑 Owned by the Local Masai Family:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spirit of the Masai Mara is owned and operated by a local Masai family, ensuring an authentic experience.
texts.text: Spirit of the Masai Mara is owned and operated by a local Masai family, ensuring an authentic experience.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 👩🌾 Employing Local Families:
texts.text: 👩🌾 Employing Local Families:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The lodge provides employment for local families and focuses on empowering women through roles in guest relations, guiding, and other operations.
texts.text: The lodge provides employment for local families and focuses on empowering women through roles in guest relations, guiding, and other operations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 💪 Supporting Local Communities:
texts.text: 💪 Supporting Local Communities:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: By staying at Spirit of the Masai Mara, guests contribute to local schools and community projects, particularly those focused on women's empowerment.
texts.text: By staying at Spirit of the Masai Mara, guests contribute to local schools and community projects, particularly those focused on women's empowerment.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5) Safety & Security - Seamless Comfort in the Wilderness
texts.text: 5) Safety & Security - Seamless Comfort in the Wilderness

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ️ Rural Environment with Secure Surroundings:
texts.text: ️ Rural Environment with Secure Surroundings:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Set on 56,000 acres of pristine conservation land, Spirit of the Masai Mara provides a perfect balance between wilderness and security.
texts.text: Set on 56,000 acres of pristine conservation land, Spirit of the Masai Mara provides a perfect balance between wilderness and security.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 💫 Immersed in Local Culture:
texts.text: 💫 Immersed in Local Culture:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests can experience Masai culture through traditional dress, warrior training, bush walks, and animal tracking with expert guides.
texts.text: Guests can experience Masai culture through traditional dress, warrior training, bush walks, and animal tracking with expert guides.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6) No Malaria Zone - Peace of Mind for Families 👨👩👧👦
texts.text: 6) No Malaria Zone - Peace of Mind for Families 👨👩👧👦

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ️ High-Altitude Location:
texts.text: ️ High-Altitude Location:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The lodge's altitude creates a malaria-free zone, ideal for families.
texts.text: The lodge's altitude creates a malaria-free zone, ideal for families.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 🏥 Access to Medical Facilities:
texts.text: 🏥 Access to Medical Facilities:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nearby clinics and AMREF emergency services ensure that medical help is readily available.
texts.text: Nearby clinics and AMREF emergency services ensure that medical help is readily available.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With a unique combination of luxury, culture and unparalleled wildlife Spirit Of The Masai Mara offers an immersive, once in a lifetime safari experience perfect for families, adventures and luxury seekers alike
texts.text: With a unique combination of luxury, culture and unparalleled wildlife Spirit Of The Masai Mara offers an immersive, once in a lifetime safari experience perfect for families, adventures and luxury seekers alike
